message.content:
@startuml
package common
  package domain
    package repository
      interface FeatureConfigRepository
      method fetch() : Future<FeatureConfig>
    end
    package entities
      entity FeatureConfig
        attribute isPasswordSignInOptionEnabled : bool
        attribute isDebugMenuEnabled : bool
    end
    package usecases
      interface FetchFeatureConfigUseCase
      method call(FeatureConfigParam params) : Future<FeatureConfig>
      uses repository
    end
    package parameters
      entity FeatureConfigParam
        attribute isPasswordSignInOptionEnabled : bool
        attribute isDebugMenuEnabled : bool
    end
    uses usecases
  end
  package base
    package domain
      package usecases
        interface UseCase
        method call() : Type
        uses :Type, Params
    end
  end
  uses repository
  uses usecases
  uses usecases
  uses usecases
